title: skebob
body:
This unusual resource pack adds the legendary Scobob to Minecraft – a new mob with a huge beak and unique sounds!

, Main features:
Scobob is the new hostile (or neutral?) a mob that replaces regular chickens/animals.

A unique drop – raw KFC chicken falls out instead of meat (yes, it's real!).

Culinary upgrade – if you bake it in the oven, you will get a KFC Basket – a very satisfying and powerful food source!

New structures – KFC restaurants are being created in the world, where Staples work (maybe they are chefs there? 👨🍳).
